phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa la schiacciata, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh KWAN-toh KOS-tah lah skyah-CHAH-tah pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Costa circa due euro al pezzo.
likely_response.pronunciation: KOH-stah CHEER-kah DOO-eh eh-OO-roh AHL PEHTS-tsoh
likely_response.translation_en: It costs about two euros per piece.

responses.english: It costs about two euros per piece.
responses.phonetic: KOH-stah CHEER-kah DOO-eh eh-OO-roh AHL PEHTS-tsoh
responses.local: Costa circa due euro al pezzo.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è fresca la schiacciata oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eh FREH-skah lah skyat-CHAH-tah OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso avere una scatola regalo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh POS-soh ah-VEH-reh OO-nah SKAH-toh-lah reh-GAH-loh pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Sì, è disponibile al banco con un supplemento.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÌ È dee-spoh-nee-BEE-leh AHL BAHN-koh KOHN OON soopp-leh-MEHN-toh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is available at the counter with a supplement.

responses.english: Yes, it is available at the counter with a supplement.
responses.phonetic: SÌ È dee-spoh-nee-BEE-leh AHL BAHN-koh KOHN OON soopp-leh-MEHN-toh
responses.local: Sì, è disponibile al banco con un supplemento.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso sedermi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh POS-soh seh-DER-mee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the small tables near the window.

responses.english: At the small tables near the window.
